advice.moderate: Sunglasses on bright spells; SPF 30 if you're out a while.
advice.high: SPF 30+, hat and shade around midday.
advice.veryHigh: Extra protection — try to avoid the sun 11:00–16:00.
advice.extreme: Take every precaution — avoid being outside at midday.

night.line: The sun's off duty 🌙 — UV picks back up at sunrise.
night.advice: Save the sunscreen for the morning.
